title: Elements by Periodic Group
editorialSummary: Chemical elements by periodic table group. False trail: Sodium and Potassium feel like one group to non-chemists — they are both alkali metals, correctly together. Hardest part: separating alkali (Group 1) from alkaline earth (Group 2). Barium and Calcium are most commonly misidentified. Noble gases and Halogens are the solving anchors.
